files.notes: This file contains three distinct lesson sections from the Guide Lessons for May. The third lesson appears to be cut off mid-sentence, suggesting the file may be incomplete or truncated. Each lesson has a clear Roman numeral heading and distinct subject matter - Industry/Vocation, Social Service/Child Study, and Literature respectively.
